title: Power intelligent agents with AI-native databases
summary: AI-native databases enable intelligent agents to access enterprise data through AI-powered search, natural language interfaces, and multimodal queries. The session covers graph retrieval-augmented generation, Model Context Protocol, and agentic IDEs for agent deployment and context management.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech session explains how AI-native databases let intelligent agents reach enterprise data through AI-powered search, natural language interfaces, and multimodal queries. It covers graph retrieval-augmented generation, the Model Context Protocol, and agentic IDEs for deploying agents and managing context. The takeaways center on connecting agents to enterprise data via these retrieval and protocol layers rather than direct, hand-written queries.
